introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Family Fun in Duhok, Dohuk, Iraq. The ride used to operate at Tivoli Karolinelund between 	1985 and 4 September 2010.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was built by Arrow Dynamics.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Family Fun in Duhok, Dohuk, Iraq. The ride used to operate at Tivoli Karolinelund between 	1985 and 4 September 2010.

See Boomerang (Vekoma product)

White track and green supports.

The train was built by Arrow Dynamics.
